NxGate - Class in xyz.noxlydev.nxgate
A Java wrapper for communicating with NxGate - supports cloud and self-hosted setups.
NxGate(String) - Constructor for class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Create a new NxGate instance with your user ID.

Create a new NxGate instance with your user ID and public RSA key.

The result of a license verification.

Verify a license key.
verify(String, String) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Verify a license key with a specific scope.
verify(String, String, String) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Verify a license key with a specific scope and metadata that should be associated with the verification request.
verifyBlocking(String) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.HardenedNxGate
Verify synchronously.
verifySimple(String) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Verify a license key and return a boolean indicating whether the license key is valid.
verifySimple(String, String) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Verify a license key with a specific scope and return a boolean indicating whether the license key is valid.
verifySimple(String, String, String) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Verify a license key with a specific scope and metadata.

W

withMetadataAugmentation(boolean) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
When enabled, the metadata string sent to the server is augmented with machineFp=...;jarFp=... so admins can detect tampering / cloned hardware.
withRetry(int, long) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Enable automatic retry of transient failures (CONNECTION_ERROR / SERVER_ERROR).
withTimeout(int, int) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Set HTTP timeouts.
withTlsPinning(List<String>) - Method in class xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate
Pin one or more server certificate SHA-256 fingerprints (hex, no colons).
